common.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

landing.title: MiroFish Swarm Intelligence
landing.subtitle: Predict campaign outcomes before they happen. Simulate how prospects react to your outbound, signals, and pricing changes.
landing.demoNote: Interactive demo with simulated swarm intelligence
landing.noScenariosHint: Check back soon — scenarios are being configured.
landing.customSimulationDesc: Bring your own seed document and configure a simulation from scratch.
landing.builtFor: Built for GTM teams who ship

steps.seedDesc: Upload campaign copy, signal definitions, or pricing scenarios as seed information.
steps.simulateDesc: Hundreds of AI agents with unique personas interact, debate, and react on simulated social platforms.
steps.reportDesc: Multi-chapter analysis reveals engagement patterns, objections, and segment-specific insights.

landing.meetTheSwarmDesc: Every agent is a unique buyer persona with realistic demographics, motivations, and objection patterns drawn from your ICP.
landing.plusThousands: + thousands more generated from your ICP distribution

capabilities.outboundDesc: Test subject lines, messaging angles, and cadence sequences against hundreds of AI personas before sending a single real email.
capabilities.signalDesc: Test whether your sales signals actually predict buying behavior. Identify false positives before routing them to reps.
capabilities.pricingDesc: Predict churn risk, competitive switching, and sentiment before rolling out pricing changes to real customers.
capabilities.personalizationDesc: Rank message variants by simulated engagement, not LLM self-assessment. Find the best tone, length, and CTA for each segment.

cta.title: Ready to simulate your next GTM motion?
cta.subtitle: Choose a scenario above or create a custom simulation.

settings.title: Settings
settings.zepSignup: Sign up at {link} — free tier is sufficient for PoC.
settings.networkError: Network error — is the backend running?
settings.defaultsHint: These defaults pre-fill the Scenario Builder. You can override them per-simulation.
settings.demoModeBannerDesc: Using simulated data. API keys are not required.
settings.demoProdHint: Running in demo mode with pre-generated simulation data. Switch to production mode by setting {code} and configuring API keys.
settings.localStorageHint: Settings are stored locally in your browser. For Docker deployments, configure via {code} file instead.

agents.title: Agent Management
agents.subtitle: Create and customize AI simulation agents
agents.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, role, department, or expertise…
agents.noCustomAgentsHint: Create your first agent or start from a template to customize simulation personas.
agents.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

agentProfile.backstoryPlaceholder: Describe this agent's background, experience, and perspective…
agentProfile.noBackstory: No backstory added yet. Click "Add backstory" to describe this agent's background.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Cohort trends, attribution, and segment insights

chat.title: Chat with Simulation
chat.finContext: Fin has access to your simulation context. Choose a prompt below or open the Messenger to ask anything.
chat.emptyDescription: Ask follow-up questions about the simulated world and its predictions.

comparison.title: Comparison
comparison.subtitle: Compare two simulations side by side
comparison.needTwoSimulationsHint: Run at least two simulations to compare their outcomes side by side.
comparison.selectTwoPrompt: Select two different simulations above to compare their outcomes.

login.title: Sign in to MiroFish
login.subtitle: GTM simulation powered by swarm intelligence
login.signInFailed: Sign-in failed. Only @{domain} accounts are allowed.

permissions.noPermission: You don't have permission to view this page. Contact an administrator to request access.

simulations.noSimulationsHint: Run your first simulation to see results here.
simulations.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this simulation? This cannot be undone.
simulations.clearAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all simulation history? This cannot be undone.

report.title: Report
report.generateFirst: Generate a report from your simulation results.
